_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze security needs and software requirements to determine feasibility of design within time and cost constraints and security mandates.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design security and privacy architectures that enable data utility and AI innovation while maintaining protection levels appropriate to the data sensitivity and regulatory context.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.452), SP-K-003 (SP, cosine: 0.449).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.465). Shared vocabulary: [design, security]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, constraints, cost, determine, feasibility, mandates] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, appropriate, architectures, context, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.865, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (60.2%). The model interprets "Analyze security needs and software requirements to determine feasibility of des" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to design security and privacy architectures that enable data utility an" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.458 ≈ STS 0.465 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [design, security]. DCWF-only: [analyze, constraints, cost, determine, feasibility, mandates]. WIDAI-only: [ability, ai, appropriate, architectures, context, data].
